sections.paragraph:
συνορία, ας, ἡ (Peripl. Eryth. 65; OGI 168, 18 [II b.c.]; 206, 3; pap) neighboring country Mt 4:24 v.l.—DELG s.v. ὅρος.

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 974
